languages.original_text: "The clergy of the Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 cloister, in gratitude for the tidings of the sacred archeotech, request that you be attended by Magos Eogunn Februs and the unit Nuncius. I seek your leave to employ our skills and knowledge for the benefit of the von Valancius dynasty, including but not limited to tending to the machine spirits of the Sector Bionica and conducting experiments in the name of Knowledge."

languages.text: "Духовенство обители Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17 в благодарность за вести о священном археотехе просит принять в сопровождение магоса Эоганна Фебруса и единицу Нунциус. Я испрашиваю дозволения на использование наших навыков и знаний на благо династии фон Валанциус, включая, но не ограничиваясь, уходом за духами машин Сектора Бионика и экспериментами, служащими на благо делу Познания".

"The clergy of the Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 cloister, in gratitude for the tidings of the sacred archeotech, request that you be attended by Magos Eogunn Februs and the unit Nuncius. languages.text: 「アルタール・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17修道院の聖職者は、聖なるアーケオテクノロジーの知らせに感謝し、マゴス・エオガン・フェブルスとヌンシウス部隊の御世話をお願いいたします。私は、セクター・ビオニカの機械霊の世話や知識の名のもとの実験など、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の利益のために、私たちのスキルと知識を雇用することを許可していただきます。」
languages.original_text: "The clergy of the Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 cloister, in gratitude for the tidings of the sacred archeotech, request that you be attended by Magos Eogunn Februs and the unit Nuncius. I seek your leave to employ our skills and knowledge for the benefit of the von Valancius dynasty, including but not limited to tending to the machine spirits of the Sector Bionica and conducting experiments in the name of Knowledge."

languages.text: "Die Priesterschaft des Klosters auf Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 wünscht, dass Ihr zum Dank für die Kunde über die heilige Archäotech von Magos Eogunn Februs und der Einheit Nuncius begleitet werdet. Ich bitte Euch um Erlaubnis, unsere Fähigkeiten und unser Wissen zum Wohl der Dynastie derer von Valancius zu nutzen, einschließlich der Pflege der Maschinengeister des Sektors Bionica und der Durchführung von Experimenten im Namen des Wissens."
languages.original_text: "The clergy of the Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 cloister, in gratitude for the tidings of the sacred archeotech, request that you be attended by Magos Eogunn Februs and the unit Nuncius. I seek your leave to employ our skills and knowledge for the benefit of the von Valancius dynasty, including but not limited to tending to the machine spirits of the Sector Bionica and conducting experiments in the name of Knowledge."

traits.locale_text: "Die Priesterschaft des Klosters auf Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 wünscht, dass Ihr zum Dank für die Kunde über die heilige Archäotech von Magos Eo-gann Februs und der Einheit Nuncius begleitet werdet. Ich bitte Euch um Erlaubnis, unsere Fähigkeiten und unser Wissen zum Wohl der Dynastie derer von Valancius zu nutzen, einschließlich der Pflege der Maschinengeister des Sektors Bionica und der Durchführung von Experimenten im Namen des Wissens."

languages.text: «El clero del monasterio de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, en agradecimiento por las noticias sobre la sagrada arqueotecnología, solicita que acepte usted los servicios del magos Eogunn Februs y la unidad Nuncius. Rogamos que tenga a bien emplear nuestras aptitudes y conocimientos en beneficio de la dinastía von Valancius, incluyendo no solo el mantenimiento de los espíritu máquina del Sector Bionica, sino la realización de experimentos en nombre del Conocimiento».
languages.original_text: "The clergy of the Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 cloister, in gratitude for the tidings of the sacred archeotech, request that you be attended by Magos Eogunn Februs and the unit Nuncius. I seek your leave to employ our skills and knowledge for the benefit of the von Valancius dynasty, including but not limited to tending to the machine spirits of the Sector Bionica and conducting experiments in the name of Knowledge."

traits.locale_text: «El clero del monasterio de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, en agradecimiento por las noticias sobre la sagrada arqueotecnología, solicita que acepte usted los servicios del magos Eo-gann Februs y la unidad Nuncius. Rogamos que tenga a bien emplear nuestras aptitudes y conocimientos en beneficio de la dinastía von Valancius, incluyendo no solo el mantenimiento de los espíritu máquina del Sector Bionica, sino la realización de experimentos en nombre del Conocimiento».

languages.text: "Kutsal arkeotek haberinden minnet duyan Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 manastırının ruhbanları, size Magos Eogunn Februs ve Nuncius biriminin eşlik etmesini talep ediyor. Becerilerimizi ve irfanımızı, Sektör Biyonika'nın makine ruhlarıyla ilgilenmek ve İrfan adına deneyler yürütmek de dâhil olup bunlarla sınırlı kalmamak üzere von Valancius hanedanlığının yararına kullanmak için izninizi istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "The clergy of the Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 cloister, in gratitude for the tidings of the sacred archeotech, request that you be attended by Magos Eogunn Februs and the unit Nuncius. I seek your leave to employ our skills and knowledge for the benefit of the von Valancius dynasty, including but not limited to tending to the machine spirits of the Sector Bionica and conducting experiments in the name of Knowledge."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal arkeotek haberinden minnet duyan Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 manastırının ruhbanları, size Magos Eo-gann Februs ve Nuncius biriminin eşlik etmesini talep ediyor. Becerilerimizi ve irfanımızı, Sektör Biyonika'nın makine ruhlarıyla ilgilenmek ve İrfan adına deneyler yürütmek de dâhil olup bunlarla sınırlı kalmamak üzere von Valancius hanedanlığının yararına kullanmak için izninizi istiyorum."

languages.text: « Le clergé du cloître d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, en remerciement pour les nouvelles concernant l'archéotechnologie sacrée, demande à ce que vous soyez {mf|assisté|assistée} par le magos Eogunn Februs et l'unité Nuncius. Je sollicite votre autorisation de mettre nos compétences et connaissances au service de la dynastie von Valancius, notamment pour l'entretien des esprits de la machine du secteur Bionica et la réalisation d'expériences au nom de la connaissance. »
languages.original_text: "The clergy of the Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 cloister, in gratitude for the tidings of the sacred archeotech, request that you be attended by Magos Eogunn Februs and the unit Nuncius. I seek your leave to employ our skills and knowledge for the benefit of the von Valancius dynasty, including but not limited to tending to the machine spirits of the Sector Bionica and conducting experiments in the name of Knowledge."

traits.locale_text: « Le clergé du cloître d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, en remerciement pour les nouvelles concernant l'archéotechnologie sacrée, demande à ce que vous soyez {mf|assisté|assistée} par le magos Eo-gann Februs et l'unité Nuncius. Je sollicite votre autorisation de mettre nos compétences et connaissances au service de la dynastie von Valancius, notamment pour l'entretien des esprits de la machine du secteur Bionica et la réalisation d'expériences au nom de la connaissance. »

languages.text: “卡利西斯祭坛17号修道院的神职人员，为感激您带来的神圣远古科技的消息，恳请您接纳贤者伊奥贡·费布鲁斯与努恩修斯单位随行侍奉。我恳请您允许我们运用技能与知识，为冯·瓦兰修斯王朝效力，包括但不限于照管仿生区的机魂，并以知识之名进行实验。”
languages.original_text: "The clergy of the Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 cloister, in gratitude for the tidings of the sacred archeotech, request that you be attended by Magos Eogunn Februs and the unit Nuncius. I seek your leave to employ our skills and knowledge for the benefit of the von Valancius dynasty, including but not limited to tending to the machine spirits of the Sector Bionica and conducting experiments in the name of Knowledge."

traits.locale_text: “卡利西斯祭坛17号修道院的神职人员，为感激您带来的神圣远古科技的消息，恳请您接纳贤者埃欧-甘·费布鲁斯与努恩修斯单位随行侍奉。我恳请您允许我们运用技能与知识，为冯·瓦兰修斯王朝效力，包括但不限于照管仿生区的机魂，并以知识之名进行实验。”
